description: Official LaTeX template for submissions to the Immersive Learning Research Network (iLRN) Conferences, covering Short Papers, Extended Abstracts, Doctoral Colloquium, iLEAD, and iLRNFuser contributions. Provides the required title, author, abstract, and keyword formatting, four levels of section headings, custom figure/table caption styles, and a Springer MathPhySci-style bibliography, based on a custom document class.
